evals.name: leo-satellite-balanced
evals.prompt: Enrich the research report at /Users/stephandehaas/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-deHaas-BeratenderIngenieurfürKI-Digitalisierung/TSC/cogni-research/the-evolution-of-the-leo-satellite-marke-2026-04-13/output/report.md with density balanced. Use the Deutsche Telekom theme (design-variables already at cogni-visual/design-variables.json in the same project directory).
evals.expected_output: Themed HTML file with 3-5 enrichments: comparison-bar for operator/country data tables, timeline-chart for IRIS2 milestones, process-flow for telco cooperation models. No enrichments in References. Infographic header with KPI cards for headline numbers (USD 11.81B, 10K satellites, etc).
assertions: Enrichment plan has 3-5 total enrichments (balanced density range)
No enrichments target References or appendix sections
At least one enrichment extracts numeric data from executive summary
Every enrichment has a non-empty data field with extracted values
No two enrichments within 15 source lines of each other
Output HTML contains canvas elements for data-track enrichments
HTML link count >= 112 (source citation count)
HTML contains all 13 H2 section headings
HTML contains sidebar navigation
Python generator script was used (not hand-written HTML)

evals.name: leo-satellite-rich
evals.prompt: Enrich the research report at /Users/stephandehaas/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-deHaas-BeratenderIngenieurfürKI-Digitalisierung/TSC/cogni-research/the-evolution-of-the-leo-satellite-marke-2026-04-13/output/report.md with density rich. Use the Deutsche Telekom theme.
evals.expected_output: Themed HTML with 5-8 enrichments using at least 3 different chart/diagram types. Enrichments spread across 4+ H2 sections. Higher density should add meaningful variety, not just duplicate the balanced set.
assertions: Enrichment plan has 5-8 total enrichments (rich density range)
At least 3 different enrichment types used
Enrichments distributed across at least 4 different H2 sections
No enrichments in References or appendix sections
Every enrichment has non-empty data field
No two enrichments within 15 lines of each other
Output HTML exists with Chart.js canvas elements
HTML preserves all 13 H2 headings and 112+ citation links
Rich density adds meaningful variety over balanced

evals.name: leo-satellite-non-interactive
evals.prompt: Enrich the research report at /Users/stephandehaas/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-deHaas-BeratenderIngenieurfürKI-Digitalisierung/TSC/cogni-research/the-evolution-of-the-leo-satellite-marke-2026-04-13/output/report.md with density balanced and interactive=false. Use the Deutsche Telekom theme.
evals.expected_output: Equivalent to the balanced run but fully automated. No user prompts. Same enrichment quality and coverage.
assertions: Enrichment plan has 3-5 enrichments (balanced density)
No AskUserQuestion calls during execution
Every enrichment has non-empty data field
Output HTML exists with sidebar, charts, and all 13 headings
Enrichment types comparable to balanced interactive run
HTML preserves 112+ citation links
Python generator script used for HTML assembly
